allowed_context.goal: Add one concise operational note to docs/guides/validator-pipeline-ko.md stating that secret-like values in handoff payloads are blocked by wrappers before any model CLI invocation.
success_criteria: The guide contains the requested secret-like handoff preflight note.
The edit is minimal and documentation-only.
No real secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values are introduced.

positive: Prefer adding the note near the validator handoff input or execution section.
negative: Do not modify wrapper scripts, schemas, reports, ledgers, or unrelated docs.
Do not include any secret-looking dummy value.

session_excerpts: User requested this small documentation task be processed through the actual Generator -> Validator-A flow and logged for later pipeline improvement analysis.

forbidden_context: Secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values
